name: Tidio Live Chat API
what_it_does: Live chat and AI chatbot platform with REST API for customer support — combining live agent chat, automated chatbot flows, and AI responses (Lyro AI) for ecommerce businesses, with API for contact management and conversation data access.
use_cases: Syncing Tidio contact and conversation data with CRM systems via REST API
Triggering chatbot flows based on external events via API
Accessing conversation history and customer interaction logs programmatically
Managing contacts and their properties via API for segmentation
Webhook integration for routing new conversation events to agent systems
not_for: Enterprise omnichannel contact center (use Genesys or Five9)
Complex ticket management workflows beyond basic chat (use Zendesk)
High-volume programmatic messaging without live agent support
best_when: An ecommerce team needs simple live chat with AI bot fallback and basic API access for CRM integration, especially with Shopify or WooCommerce.
avoid_when: You need complex enterprise support workflows, advanced ticketing, or deep programmatic control over conversation routing.

auth.notes: API key from project settings. Bearer token in Authorization header. Project-scoped access. No fine-grained OAuth2 scopes. Single API key per project.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free: live chat with 50 conversations/month, basic chatbot
pricing.paid_tiers: Starter from $19/month; Growth from $49/month; Tidio+ from $749/month
pricing.notes: Generous free tier for small businesses. API access on Growth plan and above. Polish company (Szczecin). Strong Shopify app ecosystem. Lyro AI chatbot (GPT-powered) adds AI responses. 300,000+ customers.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per plan; contact support for specifics

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for contacts, conversations, and operators. Webhook support for conversation events. Limited API surface — primarily for data access and contact management. Cannot build complex chatbot flows via API. Smaller API than Intercom or Crisp.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Contact creation idempotent by email. Conversation access idempotent. Message sends create new messages. Property updates idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: API access requires Growth plan or above
Cannot create chatbot flows via API — visual builder only
Lyro AI feature separate from core API — AI responses not configurable via API
Rate limits not publicly documented — contact support for production use cases

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant — Polish/EU company. EU data residency. API key auth. Webhook secret for event verification. No formal certifications beyond GDPR. Standard live chat security practices.
